query:
-- Confirm all 11 are now linked
SELECT pn.customerName, pn.number, pn.providerServiceCode, pn.serviceExternalId, pn.customerExternalId,
       s.planName AS servicePlan, c.name AS linkedCustomer
FROM phone_numbers pn
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = pn.serviceExternalId
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = pn.customerExternalId
WHERE pn.provider = 'CommsCode'
  AND pn.customerName IN ('Action Smart Group', 'Envest')
ORDER BY pn.customerName, pn.number;
